headline: T-Mobile Shoots Down Cable TV Acquisition On Q1 Earnings Call
summary: T-Mobile stock rose after the wireless services firm said it is not interested in buying a cable TV company.

headline: Citi, RBC Capital See Improving Broadband Trends at Comcast (CMCSA)
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.79%, Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is included among the 10 Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 24, Citi raised the firm’s price recommendation on Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) to $35.50 from $33. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares.
